description: Indicates when childcare is available on this day. Each property is independent: omitting a property clears any previously set value for it.

start.description: The time at which childcare becomes available on this day, in H:MM or HH:MM format (24-hour notation). Must be earlier than `opens`.

end.description: The time at which childcare ends on this day, in H:MM or HH:MM format (24-hour notation). Must be later than `closes`.
